title: Junior Revenue Manager at Sodexo India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Sodexo India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Sodexo India Global Group in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sodexo India Global Group:
Sodexo India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sodexo India Global Group!
